title: EggMod
description: A mod which adds more ways to eat eggs in minecraft.
body:
## BASIC INFO
__This mod adds more ways to eat eggs in minecraft(currently only one more).__   
__Currently it only has boiled eggs. To make a boiled egg just smelt an egg in a furnace*.__

__You will like this mod if you want to be able to convert eggs to food in an easy way or in more ways in general.__
  
__This mod has 1.12.2, 1.18.2 and 1.20.4 versions. The 1.18.2 and 1.20.4 have both forge and fabric versions, but the 1.12.2 version only has a forge version. Not all versions will recieve all of the updates.__
### *NOTE: I know this isn't accurate in real life, it will become more accurate in future updates.   
## SUPPORT
__if you are having any problems with the mod, dm me (legoaggelos) in discord.__
### NOTE: if your game is crashing with fabric, try updating the fabric loader to the latest version and fabric api to the latest version.

## UPCOMING UPDATES
- **0.0.2 Update: This update will add a Greek translation! This update will come to all        loaders and all versions of the mod. **   
- **More coming soon™!**
